title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.787 - Recognition of judgment in situations not covered by uniform law
text:
511.787.  Recognition of judgment in situations not covered by uniform law. — Sections 511.770 to 511.787 do not prevent the recognition of a foreign country judgment in situations not covered by sections 511.770 to 511.787.
(L. 1984 H.B. 957 § 7)
